no_changes_rationale:
## No Changes Rationale

### What I looked for
All acceptance criteria for bead axon-43ed769b:
- All ADR-018 types (TenantId, UserId, Tenant, User, UserIdentity, TenantMember, TenantRole, Op, GrantedDatabase, Grants, JwtClaims, AuthError)
- Serde round-trip tests per type
- aud array-form → AuthError::CredentialMalformed test
- TenantRole delegation helper proptest
- AUTH_ERROR_VARIANT_COUNT == 14 compile-time constant
- cargo test -p axon-core green
- cargo clippy -p axon-core -- -D warnings clean

### Where I found it
All work is present in commit `91d4bdb feat(auth-core): add ADR-018 tenant/user/credential types [axon-43ed769b]`:

- `crates/axon-core/src/auth.rs` contains all required types (lines 712–995)
- Round-trip serde tests: tenant_id_roundtrip, user_id_roundtrip, tenant_roundtrip, user_roundtrip, user_without_email_roundtrip, user_identity_roundtrip, tenant_member_roundtrip, tenant_role_roundtrip, op_roundtrip, granted_database_roundtrip, grants_roundtrip, jwt_claims_roundtrip
- aud array test: `jwt_claims_aud_array_returns_credential_malformed` (line 1213)
- TenantRole delegation proptest tests: admin_can_delegate_all_ops_always, write_can_delegate_read_and_write_only, read_can_delegate_read_only (lines 1297–1330)
- `AUTH_ERROR_VARIANT_COUNT = 14` constant (line 995) with `auth_error_variant_count_is_14` test (line 1264)

### Verification
- `cargo test -p axon-core`: 109 passed, 0 failed
- `cargo clippy -p axon-core -- -D warnings`: clean (no warnings)
- All 14 AuthError variants confirmed via auth_error_display test

The bead is fully satisfied. No additional changes required.
